Use Dev Containers to Build a Safe, Isolated Environment for AI-Driven Development

A lot of people are excited about automated development — some would love to let AI Agents handle everything end-to-end. But there are real concerns: security, environment consistency, dependency management, and so on. There have already been multiple incidents where Auto AI Agents, with no isolated environment, ran commands directly on the host and wiped systems or destroyed data. So this post is about how to use Dev Containers to build an isolated development environment where AI Agents can work in a controlled space.
